title: genista ferox var. salditana
intro: Genista ferox var. salditana, also known as the 'Salditana Spiny Broom', is a shrubby perennial plant belonging to the Fabaceae family, characterized by its thorny stems and small yellow flowers. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Genista ferox var. salditana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve its flowers, leaves, and stems being dried and then used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
